prompt.description: Browse, create and apply prompt templates.
prompt.title: Title

translate.title: Translation Template
translate.content: Translate the following content into the target language. If the content is Chinese, translate it into English; if it is English, translate it into Chinese. Preserve the original tone, style, and terminology.

coder.title: Code Question
coder.content: Provide writing, debugging, and optimization guidance for the following code or question. Explain the key reasons, risks, and actionable best practices.

writer.title: Writing Revision
writer.content: Improve the structure, wording, and expression of the following text while preserving its intent, and provide constructive revision suggestions.

summarizer.title: Content Summary
summarizer.content: Summarize the following content, extract the key points, and present them clearly and concisely.

explainer.title: Concept Explainer
explainer.content: Explain the following concept or question in plain language, using analogies and examples when helpful.
